# firstPickup

**Instance Property**

Access the first time the person picked up the device during the activity segment.

## Declaration

```swift
var firstPickup: Date?
```

## Discussion

This value may be `nil` if the person never picked up the device during [doc://com.apple.DeviceActivity/documentation/DeviceActivity/DeviceActivityData/ActivitySegment/dateInterval].

## Tracking device usage

- **totalPickupsWithoutApplicationActivity**: Access the number of device pickups without application use.
